product_description: Ứng dụng nhận diện đồng xu qua camera, hiển thị thông tin đồng xu và khoảng giá trị tham khảo. Ứng dụng không cung cấp định giá chính thức và không đảm bảo giá bán thực tế.
brief:
Nam, 55 tuổi, mũ phớt. Bối cảnh: Chợ trời đông đúc.	0s - 05s	Người diễn cầm một đồng xu lạ, liếc mắt nhìn người bán (đang làm giá) rồi quay mặt đi chỗ khác.		"En el mercadillo siempre hay tesoros, pero no quiero que me engañen." (Ở chợ trời luôn có kho báu, nhưng tôi không muốn bị lừa.)
	05s - 15s	Lén rút điện thoại ra dưới gầm bàn, thao tác cực nhanh.		"Por eso uso Coin Identifier discretamente. Es gratis y súper rápida." (Nên tôi lén dùng Coin Identifier. Nó miễn phí và siêu nhanh.)
	15s - 25s	App báo giá trị cao gấp 10 lần. Người diễn nhếch mép cười đắc ý.		Voiceover (TBN): "Me dio un precio de referencia alto, ¡la compraré por unos centavos!" (Nó cho giá cao, tôi sẽ mua nó với vài xu!)
	25s - 35s	Trả tiền, bỏ đồng xu vào túi, nháy mắt với camera.		Sé más listo en tus compras. Descarga la app gratis aquí." (Hãy thông minh hơn khi mua sắm. Tải app tại đây.)

storySpine.logline: A seasoned flea market shopper uses a discreet coin identification app to uncover hidden treasures and outsmart sellers, securing valuable coins for a bargain.
storySpine.storyPromise: The audience will see how a smart shopper leverages technology to gain an advantage in finding valuable coins and making profitable purchases.
storySpine.objective: Drive app installs for the Coin Identifier app by demonstrating its utility, speed, and discreetness in a real-world scenario.
storySpine.initialCondition: An older man, intrigued by a unique coin at a bustling flea market, suspects the seller might be overpricing it.
storySpine.finalOutcome: The man confidently purchases the coin at a low price, having confirmed its high value using the app, and winks at the camera, inviting others to download the app.

worldBible.characterLock: Maintain the identity of the 55-year-old East Asian man named Nam, with his specific fedora hat, light blue shirt, and jacket. Ensure consistent facial features, age, and attire across all shots.
worldBible.locationLock: Maintain the crowded outdoor flea market setting with its specific stall, old wooden table, and background elements. Ensure consistent natural daylight and the arrangement of props on the table. Camera angles should reflect views from the same fixed layout.
worldBible.productLock: Preserve the exact UI layout, colors, fonts, and content of the Coin Identifier app as shown in the provided product reference images (home, scan, result screens). Do not alter button placement, text, or image content.
worldBible.visualGrammar: Handheld, slightly dynamic camera work, close-ups on the coin, phone screen, and character's expressions. Composition should feel authentic and unpolished, mimicking user-generated content, with a focus on the character's perspective. Use eye-level shots predominantly.
worldBible.lightingContinuity: Natural, diffused daylight typical of an outdoor or semi-outdoor flea market. Avoid harsh shadows. Lighting should highlight the coin and phone screen clearly when they are the focus, otherwise maintain a consistent ambient light.
worldBible.atmosphereContinuity: The bustling sounds of a crowded flea market (chatter, distant vendor calls, occasional music) should be present throughout, providing a consistent, lively backdrop. The atmosphere should feel authentic and slightly chaotic, but never distracting from the main action.
antiDriftRules: Re-anchor every scene from canonical character, location, and product references.
Use generated output only as an observed handoff, never as the sole identity source.
Do not silently change face, wardrobe, product geometry, location layout, or exact reference names.

limitations: Face and object consistency can be improved but cannot be guaranteed permanently by orchestration alone.
Exact UI and small readable text should come from a locked keyframe or post-production, not free generation.
Separate generated clips need final music, subtitle, and transition assembly in an editor.

safetyPlan.referencePolicy: Each keyframe may use zero or one uploaded product/app reference. Do not attach multiple app screens to one keyframe. Character and location references are used for consistency.
rewriteRules: If a specific celebrity or protected identity is implied, replace with a generic, age-appropriate actor matching the description.
Ensure all UI text is readable and consistent with provided app screenshots, avoiding any unapproved modifications.

qualityStrategy.oneVariableRule: Change one prompt clause, seed, mode, or reference per retake.
